videos.title: The Most Broken Combos in the History of Magic the Gathering
videos.description:
Combos have been a part of Magic for as long as they game has been around, today we take a walk through Magic's history and look at the most broken combos in the history of the game!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

#MTG #MagicTheGathering
